g.text: Zdiff (differential impedance) is equal to 2 * Zodd,

g.desc: Zdiff (differential impedance) is equal to 2 * Zodd,

g.text: so a Zodd of 45 Ω gives us a Zdiff of 90 Ω

g.desc: so a Zodd of 45 Ω gives us a Zdiff of 90 Ω
